rationale.D1: Confirmed command-based with SubsystemBase subclasses owning hardware directly (DriveSubsystemSRX, BellySubsystem, ShooterSubsystem etc.) and a Constants file; no IO interfaces or swappable implementations found anywhere in the codebase.
rationale.D2: Confirmed command composition via SequentialCommandGroup/ParallelCommandGroup in Autonomous.java and button bindings in RobotContainer; no Superstructure coordinator, no state machine, no WantedState/SystemState enums.
rationale.D3: Confirmed vendor physics sim (SparkFlexSim.iterate()) in BellySubsystem and IntakeDeploymentSubsystem, plus kinematic pose simulation in PreussDriveSimulation, but no WPILib ElevatorSim/FlywheelSim physics classes and no whole-robot sim workflow; discounted candidate D3=1 to 1.5 for the real vendor sim wiring.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists; ShooterTest.java in commands/ is a runtime tuning command, not a JUnit test; test dependency in build.gradle is boilerplate only with zero test files.
rationale.D5: Confirmed SmartDashboard.put* calls scattered across Robot.java, PoseEstimatorSubsystem, IntakeSubsystem, MAXSRXSwerveModule and others; no AdvantageKit, DogLog, Epilogue, or structured logging found.
rationale.D6: Confirmed Choreo.loadTrajectory() called for 9+ named trajectories in Robot.java; DriveChoreoPathCommand implements a full Choreo trajectory follower with PID controllers; multiple autoCommands use the loaded trajectories in competition autos; PathPlanner vendored but no pathplanner code used.
rationale.D7: Confirmed PoseEstimatorSubsystem uses SwerveDrivePoseEstimator with addVisionMeasurement called from PoseEstimatorCamera; ambiguity rejection logic (getPoseAmbiguity <= maximumAmbiguity), multi-camera array support, and tuned Kalman std-dev vectors all confirmed; discounted full D7=4 as no TimeInterpolatableBuffer or dedicated RobotState class.
rationale.D8: Confirmed real README with startup checklist and instructions, 5 seasons of code tracked (2022-2026) plus a library repo with historical code back to 2011 per the manifest, and ci_workflows=1 per index; no formatter/checkstyle configured in build.gradle.
